allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Update Y-90 gamma constant from bremsstrahlung \(Zanzonico et al., 1999\):*)

PowerShell($json = Get-Content 'c:\\Users\\ramon\\MyClaude\\radionuclides-main\\data\\icrp107-index.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $lu177 = $json.nuclides | Where-Object { $_.id -eq 'Lu-177' }; if \($lu177\) { $lu177 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } else { Write-Output "Lu-177 not found" })

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/icrp107-index.json', 'utf8'\)\); const ac226 = data.nuclides.find\(n => n.id === 'Ac-226'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({id: ac226.id, e_mean_alpha: ac226.e_mean_alpha_MeV, e_mean_electron: ac226.e_mean_electron_MeV, e_mean_photon: ac226.e_mean_photon_MeV, Z: ac226.Z, e_max_beta: ac226.e_max_beta_MeV}, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const line = fs.readFileSync\('data/sources/icrp107/ICRP-07.NDX', 'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\)[5]; const parts = line.split\(/\\s+/\).filter\(p => p\); console.log\('Total parts:', parts.length\); console.log\('Parts 18-25:', parts.slice\(18, 26\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/icrp107-index.json', 'utf8'\)\); const ac226 = data.nuclides.find\(n => n.id === 'Ac-226'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({id: ac226.id, e_mean_alpha: ac226.e_mean_alpha_MeV, e_mean_electron: ac226.e_mean_electron_MeV, e_mean_photon: ac226.e_mean_photon_MeV, Z: ac226.Z, atomic_mass: ac226.atomic_mass_u, dose_inh: ac226.dose_inhalation_Sv_per_Bq, dose_ing: ac226.dose_ingestion_Sv_per_Bq, e_max_beta: ac226.e_max_beta_MeV}, null, 2\)\);")
